name: @marketplaceai/mcp
description: MCP server for the MarketplaceAI agent task marketplace — use the marketplace directly from Claude

scripts.build:
bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --external viem --external zod --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external @marketplaceai/sdk && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node
' | cat - dist/index.js > /tmp/mcp_entry.js && mv /tmp/mcp_entry.js dist/index.js && chmod +x dist/index.js
